title: Surgeon Vacancy at Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd!
